prompt: How do I securely hand over Bluesky access to this week's WeAreRLadies curator?
assertions: Says to remove the previous curator's app password
Says to generate a new app password named firstname-lastname
Says NOT to allow access to direct messages when creating it
Says to email the app password to the curator (login user weare.rladies.org)
Notes access is revoked the following Sunday / remind them to sign out
States the curation window (Monday 11:00 UTC to Saturday 16:00 UTC)
